Description: "Implemented selected cell visual markers (glowing pink border), interactive cell text editor in top toolbar showing coordinates, instant keyboard focus grab and text auto-select when clicking any grid cell to support instant typing, and hid the redundant LUA SCRIPT EDITOR button on the Matrix Mixer XL view."
Instruction: "Implement cell selection borders, keyboard-focusable cell value text editor, and hide redundant script toggle button in DynamicDisplayComponent.h"
toolAction: "Implementing selected cell text editor UI and hiding redundant mode button in DynamicDisplayComponent.h"
